creator: peo@nethead.se
text:
Somethings fishy here.

Tried updating the backup server, first to 
9.3-PRERELEASE #0 r267703
Then updated ports as of today (20140622)
and got the same error.

rebuit python
rebuilt unrar

========================================
3 of 7 tests failed
(6 tests were not run)
See unit_tests/test-suite.log
Please report to http://bugs.clamav.net/
========================================

There must be someting hiding in another port or the system that I fail to see
